input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.4.6.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.4.6.1
            TITLE: inspection approval in.13.1.1 is not required prior to design judging.

            CONTENT:
            rule S.4.6.1: Inspection Approval IN.13.1.1 is not required prior to Design judging.
S.4.6.1 Inspection Approval IN.13.1.1 is not required prior to Design judging.

final_answer: Inspection Approval IN.13.1.1 is not required prior to Design judging.
